Class CreatingASTVisitor

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.CreatingASTVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visitor
Direct Known Subclasses:
FieldReplaceVisitor, ProgramElementReplacer, ProgramReplaceVisitor, ProgVarReplaceVisitor, ReplaceWhileLoop
public abstract class CreatingASTVisitor extends JavaASTVisitor
Walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order.

      public void performActionOnJmlAssert(JmlAssert x)
      Description copied from interface: Visitor
      Performs action on JML assert statement.
      Specified by:
      performActionOnJmlAssert in interface Visitor
      Overrides:
      performActionOnJmlAssert in class JavaASTVisitor
      Parameters:
      x - the statement to perform the action on.

    • getPosition

      protected static int getPosition(NonTerminalProgramElement pe1, ProgramElement pe2)
      returns the position of pe2 in the virtual child array of pe1
      Parameters:
      pe1 - A NonTerminalProgramElement
      pe2 - A ProgramElement
      Returns:
      pe2's position in pe1
